## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what the feature is and the problem it solves. -->

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What is missing or frustrating today? Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]". Link any related issue or discussion. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A clear description of what you want to happen and how it should behave. -->

## Scope

<!-- What is included in this request. -->

### Out of scope

<!-- What is explicitly NOT included, to keep the request focused. -->

## Current state / where it plugs in

<!-- How the product behaves today and which existing screens, services, models, or data this builds on. Reuse what exists; do not duplicate. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- The conditions that must be true for this to be considered done. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Test plan

<!-- How this will be verified: unit / component / integration / e2e, the key cases, and any negative or permission cases. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other solutions or approaches weighed, and why they were not chosen. -->

## Dependencies & risks

<!-- Other work this depends on, plus any security, privacy, performance, or migration considerations. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links, or anything else that helps. -->
